What We Do

COMPLETE ROOFING SOLUTIONS

From a simple repair to a full commercial project — we handle every scope with the same level of care and quality.

🏠
Residential Replacement
Full tear-off and replacement of asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and cedar shake. We handle permits, cleanup, and final inspection.
Get a Quote →
🏗️
Commercial Roofing
Flat, TPO, EPDM, and metal roofing systems for commercial and industrial properties across the Coeur d'Alene region.
Get a Quote →
🔧
Repairs & Patching
Storm damage, leak detection, flashing repair, and emergency tarping. We respond within 24 hours for urgent jobs.
Get a Quote →
❄️
Storm Damage Claims
We work directly with insurance adjusters to document damage, prepare estimates, and get your claim approved fast.
Get a Quote →
🌲
Metal Roofing
Standing seam and corrugated metal systems rated for 50+ years. Perfect for North Idaho's heavy snow loads and pine needle debris.
Get a Quote →
🔍
Roof Inspections
Pre-sale inspections, annual maintenance checks, and post-storm assessments with full photo documentation and written reports.
Get a Quote →
A+
BBB Rated
Why Ridgeline

LOCAL EXPERTISE. REAL RESULTS.

We're not a national franchise. We're your neighbors — and we build every roof like it's going on our own home.

01
North Idaho Specialists
We know the weight loads, freeze-thaw cycles, and pine needle buildup that make Idaho roofing different from anywhere else.
02
Transparent Pricing
Itemized estimates with no hidden fees. You know exactly what you're paying for before we lift a single shingle.
03
Workmanship Warranty
10-year workmanship warranty on all full replacements, backed by manufacturer warranties on materials up to 50 years.
How It Works

FROM CALL TO COMPLETION

1
Free Inspection
We come to your property, assess the roof, and document everything with photos. No charge, no pressure.
2
Detailed Estimate
You receive a written, line-by-line estimate within 24 hours. We explain every cost before you sign anything.
3
Expert Installation
Our crews show up on time, work clean, and keep you updated throughout the project — typically 1–2 days.
4
Final Walkthrough
We walk the job with you, clean up every nail and scrap, and don't collect final payment until you're 100% satisfied.
